debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
i j : ι
p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
hi : i ∈ u
hj : j ∈ u
⊢ map (fun ω => i ∈ X ω) P = map (fun ω => j ∈ X ω) P

failed_attempts:
by
    classical
    have hlaw : HasLaw X Ber(u, p) P := hX
    have hsub : ∀ᵐ s ∂Ber(u, p), s ⊆ u := bernoulliOn_ae_subset (u := u) (p := p)
    have hmem_i : MeasurableSet {s : Set ι | i ∈ s} := by
      simpa using (MeasurableEquiv.setOf.measurableSet_preimage (measurableSet_singleton i))
    have hmem_j : MeasurableSet {s : Set ι | j ∈ s} := by
      simpa using (MeasurableEquiv.setOf.measurableSet_preimage (measurableSet_singleton j))
    have hi_eq : Ber(u, p) {s : Set ι | i ∈ s} = p := by
      calc
        Ber(u, p) {s : Set ι | i ∈ s}
            = Ber(u, p) ({s : Set ι | i ∈ s} ∩ {s : Set ι | s ⊆ u}) := by
                symm
                refine measure_inter_eq_left ?_
                refine hsub.mono ?_
                intro s hs
                exact ⟨hs, hs⟩
        _ = (infinitePi fun a ↦ toNNReal p • dirac (a ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False)
              (cylinder {i} {fun _ ↦ True}) := by
                rw [bernoulliOn_apply']
                congr!
                ext s
                simp [Set.preimage, Set.image, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_inter_iff, hi]
        _ = p := by
              simpa [infinitePi_cylinder _ (.singleton _), hi, ENNReal.smul_def]
    have hj_eq : Ber(u, p) {s : Set ι | j ∈ s} = p := by
      calc
        Ber(u, p) {s : Set ι | j ∈ s}
            = Ber(u, p) ({s : Set ι | j ∈ s} ∩ {s : Set ι | s ⊆ u}) := by
                symm
                refine measure_inter_eq_left ?_
                refine hsub.mono ?_
                intro s hs
                exact ⟨hs, hs⟩
        _ = (infinitePi fun a ↦ toNNReal p • dirac (a ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False)
              (cylinder {j} {fun _ ↦ True}) := by
                rw [bernoulliOn_apply']
                congr!
                ext s
                simp [Set.preimage, Set.image, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_inter_iff, hj]
        _ = p := by
              simpa [infinitePi_cylinder _ (.singleton _), hj, ENNReal.smul_def]
    have hmap_i : map (fun ω ↦ i ∈ X ω) P = map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by
      simpa [HasLaw] using congrArg (fun μ ↦ μ.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s)) hlaw
    have hmap_j : map (fun ω ↦ j ∈ X ω) P = map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by
      simpa [HasLaw] using congrArg (fun μ ↦ μ.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s)) hlaw
    ext S hS
    have hSi : (map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p))) S =
        Ber(u, p) ((fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) ⁻¹' S) := rfl
    have hSj : (map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p))) S =
        Ber(u, p) ((fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) ⁻¹' S) := rfl
    have hSbool : MeasurableSet S := hS
    cases hSbool.eq_bot_or_eq_top with
    | inl hbot =>
        subst hbot
        simp [hmap_i, hmap_j]
    | inr htop =>
        subst htop
        simp [hmap_i, hmap_j]

by
    classical
    have hPX : P.map X = Ber(u, p) := (hX.map_eq)
    have hPi :
        P.map (fun ω ↦ i ∈ X ω) =
          (Ber(u, p)).map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) := by
      simpa [Measure.map_map] using congrArg (fun Q ↦ Q.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s)) hPX
    have hPj :
        P.map (fun ω ↦ j ∈ X ω) =
          (Ber(u, p)).map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) := by
      simpa [Measure.map_map] using congrArg (fun Q ↦ Q.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s)) hPX
    have hBij :
        (Ber(u, p)).map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) =
          (Ber(u, p)).map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) := by
      ext S hS
      have hS' : MeasurableSet ((fun b : Bool ↦ b = true) ⁻¹' S) := by
        simpa using (measurableSet_preimage (measurable_const) hS)
      have hi' : (i ∈ u) = True := by simpa using hi
      have hj' : (j ∈ u) = True := by simpa using hj
      simp [bernoulliOn_apply, hi', hj', hS', Set.preimage_image_eq, Set.image_image]
    exact (hPi.trans (hBij.trans hPj.symm))

by
    classical
    have hlaw : HasLaw X (Ber(u, p)) P := hX
    have h1 :
        map (fun ω ↦ i ∈ X ω) P =
          map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by
      simpa [HasLaw] using congrArg (fun μ ↦ Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) μ) hlaw.map_eq
    have h2 :
        map (fun ω ↦ j ∈ X ω) P =
          map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by
      simpa [HasLaw] using congrArg (fun μ ↦ Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) μ) hlaw.map_eq
    have hber :
        map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) =
          map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by
      ext S hS
      have hSi : MeasurableSet {s : Set ι | i ∈ s} :=
        MeasurableEquiv.setOf.measurableSet_preimage (MeasurableSet.singletons _ S)
      have hSj : MeasurableSet {s : Set ι | j ∈ s} :=
        MeasurableEquiv.setOf.measurableSet_preimage (MeasurableSet.singletons _ S)
      cases' S with
      | empty =>
          simp
      | singleton b =>
          by_cases hb : b
          · have : b = True := by simpa using hb
            subst this
            simp [bernoulliOn_apply', hi, hj]
          · have : b = False := by
              cases b <;> simp at hb
            subst this
            simp [bernoulliOn_apply', hi, hj]
      | insert b S h =>
          simp
    simpa [h1, h2] using hber

    classical
    ext S hS
    have hlaw : HasLaw X (Ber(u, p)) P := hX
    have hP : P.map X = Ber(u, p) := hlaw.map_eq
    have hP' : P.map (fun ω ↦ i ∈ X ω) = (Ber(u, p)).map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) := by
      simpa [Measure.map_map] using congrArg (fun Q ↦ Q.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s)) hP
    have hQ' : P.map (fun ω ↦ j ∈ X ω) = (Ber(u, p)).map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) := by
      simpa [Measure.map_map] using congrArg (fun Q ↦ Q.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s)) hP
    simp [hP', hQ', bernoulliOn_eq_map, hi, hj]

by
    classical
    have hP : P.map X = Ber(u, p) := hX.map_eq
    ext S hS
    have hmi : Measurable fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s := measurable_pi_apply i
    have hmj : Measurable fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s := measurable_pi_apply j
    calc
      P.map (fun ω ↦ i ∈ X ω) S
          = (P.map X) ((fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) ⁻¹' S) := by
              simpa [Measure.map_map, (hmi.comp (measurable_of_aemeasurable (hX.aemeasurable))).coe_fn]
      _ = Ber(u, p) ((fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) ⁻¹' S) := by simpa [hP]
      _ = (toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False) S := by
            simpa [bernoulliOn, hi] using
              (infinitePi_map_apply (μ := fun k ↦
                toNNReal p • dirac (k ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False) (i := i) hS)
      _ = (toNNReal p • dirac (j ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False) S := by simpa [hi, hj]
      _ = Ber(u, p) ((fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) ⁻¹' S) := by
            simpa [bernoulliOn, hj] using
              (infinitePi_map_apply (μ := fun k ↦
                toNNReal p • dirac (k ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False) (i := j) hS).symm
      _ = (P.map X) ((fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) ⁻¹' S) := by simpa [hP]
      _ = P.map (fun ω ↦ j ∈ X ω) S := by
            simpa [Measure.map_map, (hmj.comp (measurable_of_aemeasurable (hX.aemeasurable))).coe_fn]

by
    classical
    have hlaw : HasLaw X Ber(u, p) P := hX
    have hsub : ∀ᵐ s ∂Ber(u, p), s ⊆ u := bernoulliOn_ae_subset (u := u) (p := p)
    have hi' : ∀ᵐ s ∂Ber(u, p), (i ∈ s) = (i ∈ u ∧ i ∈ s) := by
      filter_upwards [hsub] with s hs
      by_cases his : i ∈ s
      · have : i ∈ u := hs his
        simp [his, this]
      · simp [his]
    have hj' : ∀ᵐ s ∂Ber(u, p), (j ∈ s) = (j ∈ u ∧ j ∈ s) := by
      filter_upwards [hsub] with s hs
      by_cases hjs : j ∈ s
      · have : j ∈ u := hs hjs
        simp [hjs, this]
      · simp [hjs]
    calc
      Measure.map (fun ω ↦ i ∈ X ω) P
          = Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by
            simpa [HasLaw] using congrArg (fun μ => Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) μ) hlaw
      _ = Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ u ∧ i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by
            refine Measure.map_congr ?_
            exact hi'
      _ = Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ True) (Ber(u, p)) := by simp [hi]
      _ = Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ u ∧ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by simp [hj]
      _ = Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by
            refine (Measure.map_congr ?_).symm
            exact hj'
      _ = Measure.map (fun ω ↦ j ∈ X ω) P := by
            simpa [HasLaw] using (congrArg (fun μ => Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) μ) hlaw).symm

    rcases hX with ⟨hX⟩
    have hPi :
        Measure.map (fun s : Set ι => i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) =
          Measure.map (fun s : Set ι => j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by
      ext S hS
      classical
      simpa [bernoulliOn, hi, hj] using (measurePreserving_apply_eq (P := u ↦ toNNReal p • dirac (u ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False) hi hj S hS)
    calc
      Measure.map (fun ω ↦ i ∈ X ω) P
          = Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (Measure.map X P) := by

      _ = Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by simpa [hX]
      _ = Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := hPi
      _ = Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Measure.map X P) := by simpa [hX]
      _ = Measure.map (fun ω ↦ j ∈ X ω) P := by
              simpa [Measure.map_map] using (rfl : _)

by
    classical
    have hlaw : HasLaw X Ber(u, p) P := hX
    have hXmap : Measure.map X P = Ber(u, p) := hlaw.map_eq
    have hi' : (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) = (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) := rfl
    have hj' : (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) = (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) := rfl
    have hmap_i : Measure.map (fun ω ↦ i ∈ X ω) P = Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by
      simpa [Measure.map_map] using congrArg (fun μ ↦ Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) μ) hXmap
    have hmap_j : Measure.map (fun ω ↦ j ∈ X ω) P = Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by
      simpa [Measure.map_map] using congrArg (fun μ ↦ Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) μ) hXmap
    have hBer : Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) =
        Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by
      ext S hS
      have hSi : MeasurableSet ((fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) ⁻¹' S) :=
        (Measurable.subtype_mk (measurableSet_generateFrom (Set.mem_singleton i))).measurableSet_preimage hS
      have hSj : MeasurableSet ((fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) ⁻¹' S) :=
        (Measurable.subtype_mk (measurableSet_generateFrom (Set.mem_singleton j))).measurableSet_preimage hS
      cases Set.eq_empty_or_nonempty S with
      | inl hS0 =>
        simp [hS0]
      | inr hSn =>
        cases Set.eq_univ_or_ne_univ S with
        | inl hSu =>
          simp [hSu]
        | inr hSnu =>
          have : S = {True} ∨ S = {False} := by
            classical
            -- subsets of Bool that are neither empty nor univ are singletons
            have : S ⊆ ({True} : Set Bool) ∪ {False} := by
              intro b hb
              cases b <;> simp
            have hT : (True : Bool) ∈ S ∨ (True : Bool) ∉ S := em _
            have hF : (False : Bool) ∈ S ∨ (False : Bool) ∉ S := em _
            cases hT <;> cases hF <;> try
              · exfalso
                have : (True : Bool) ∈ (Set.univ : Set Bool) := by simp
                exact hSnu (by
                  ext b; cases b <;> simp [*])
            · left
              ext b; cases b <;> simp [*]
            · right
              ext b; cases b <;> simp [*]
          have hpi : (Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p))) {True} = toNNReal p := by
            have : (Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p))) {True} =
                Ber(u, p) {s | i ∈ s} := by simp [Measure.map_apply, MeasurableSet.singleton]
            simp [this, bernoulliOn_apply', hi, infinitePi_cylinder, ENNReal.smul_def]
          have hpj : (Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p))) {True} = toNNReal p := by
            have : (Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p))) {True} =
                Ber(u, p) {s | j ∈ s} := by simp [Measure.map_apply, MeasurableSet.singleton]
            simp [this, bernoulliOn_apply', hj, infinitePi_cylinder, ENNReal.smul_def]
          have hqi : (Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p))) {False} = toNNReal (σ p) := by
            have : (Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p))) {False} =
                Ber(u, p) {s | i ∉ s} := by
                  simp [Measure.map_apply, MeasurableSet.singleton, Set.preimage, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
            simp [this, bernoulliOn_apply', hi, infinitePi_cylinder, ENNReal.smul_def]
          have hqj : (Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p))) {False} = toNNReal (σ p) := by
            have : (Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p))) {False} =
                Ber(u, p) {s | j ∉ s} := by
                  simp [Measure.map_apply, MeasurableSet.singleton, Set.preimage, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
            simp [this, bernoulliOn_apply', hj, infinitePi_cylinder, ENNReal.smul_def]
          cases this with
          | inl hSt =>
            simp [hSt, hpi, hpj]
          | inr hSf =>
            simp [hSf, hqi, hqj]
    calc
      Measure.map (fun ω ↦ i ∈ X ω) P
          = Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := hmap_i
      _ = Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := hBer
      _ = Measure.map (fun ω ↦ j ∈ X ω) P := by simpa [hmap_j]

by
    classical
    have hlaw : HasLaw X Ber(u, p) P := hX
    have hsub : ∀ᵐ s ∂Ber(u, p), s ⊆ u := bernoulliOn_ae_subset (u := u) (p := p)
    have h_i :
        map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) =
          toNNReal p • dirac True + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False := by
      ext S hS
      by_cases hT : True ∈ S
      · have : i ∈ u := hi
        simp [Measure.map_apply, measurableSet_preimage, hS, hi, hT]
      · simp [Measure.map_apply, measurableSet_preimage, hS, hi, hT]
    have h_j :
        map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) =
          toNNReal p • dirac True + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False := by
      ext S hS
      by_cases hT : True ∈ S
      · have : j ∈ u := hj
        simp [Measure.map_apply, measurableSet_preimage, hS, hj, hT]
      · simp [Measure.map_apply, measurableSet_preimage, hS, hj, hT]
    calc
      map (fun ω ↦ i ∈ X ω) P
          = map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by
              simpa [hlaw.map_eq]
      _ = toNNReal p • dirac True + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False := h_i
      _ = map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by simpa [h_j]
      _ = map (fun ω ↦ j ∈ X ω) P := by
              simpa [hlaw.map_eq]

    have hX' : map X P = Ber(u, p) := by simpa [HasLaw] using hX
    have hmi : Measurable fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s := measurable_set_mem
    have hmj : Measurable fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s := measurable_set_mem
    calc

      _ = map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by
            simp [bernoulliOn, hj, infinitePi_comp]
      _ = map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (map X P) := by simp [hX']
      _ = map (fun ω ↦ j ∈ X ω) P := by
            simpa [Measure.map_map, hmj]

    classical

    have hi' : IdentDistrib (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) (Ber(u, p)) := by
      refine ⟨?_, ?_, rfl⟩ <;> fun_prop

by
    classical
    have hlaw : HasLaw X Ber(u, p) P := hX
    have hi' : Measurable (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) := by
      simpa using (measurable_pi_iff.1 measurable_id i)
    have hj' : Measurable (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) := by
      simpa using (measurable_pi_iff.1 measurable_id j)
    have hmapi : Measure.map (fun ω ↦ i ∈ X ω) P = Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by
      simpa [HasLaw] using congrArg (Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s)) hlaw
    have hmapj : Measure.map (fun ω ↦ j ∈ X ω) P = Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by
      simpa [HasLaw] using congrArg (Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s)) hlaw
    have hsingle :
        Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) =
          toNNReal p • Measure.dirac True + toNNReal (σ p) • Measure.dirac False := by
      ext A hA
      have hA' : MeasurableSet ((fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) ⁻¹' A) := hi' hA
      simp [bernoulliOn_apply', hA, hA', hi, infinitePi_apply_finset,
        Measure.preimage, Set.preimage_image_eq, MeasurableEquiv.setOf, cylinder, Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range]
    have hsingle' :
        Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) =
          toNNReal p • Measure.dirac True + toNNReal (σ p) • Measure.dirac False := by
      ext A hA
      have hA' : MeasurableSet ((fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) ⁻¹' A) := hj' hA
      simp [bernoulliOn_apply', hA, hA', hj, infinitePi_apply_finset,
        Measure.preimage, Set.preimage_image_eq, MeasurableEquiv.setOf, cylinder, Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range]
    calc
      Measure.map (fun ω ↦ i ∈ X ω) P
          = Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := hmapi
      _ = toNNReal p • Measure.dirac True + toNNReal (σ p) • Measure.dirac False := hsingle
      _ = Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by symm; exact hsingle'
      _ = Measure.map (fun ω ↦ j ∈ X ω) P := by symm; exact hmapj

by

          = map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := hmap_i
      _ = toNNReal p • dirac True + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False := hi'
      _ = map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := (hj').symm
      _ = map (fun ω ↦ j ∈ X ω) P := hmap_j.symm

by
    classical
    have h : map X P = Ber(u, p) := hX.map_eq
    have hi' : Ber(u, p) {s | i ∈ s} = toNNReal p := by
      simpa [bernoulliOn_apply', hi] using
        (infinitePi_mem_of_mem (fun a ↦
          toNNReal p • dirac (a ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False) hi)
    have hj' : Ber(u, p) {s | j ∈ s} = toNNReal p := by
      simpa [bernoulliOn_apply', hj] using
        (infinitePi_mem_of_mem (fun a ↦
          toNNReal p • dirac (a ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False) hj)
    ext t ht
    rcases measurableSet_bool_iff.1 ht with ⟨rfl⟩
    · simp
    · simpa [Measure.map_apply, (measurableSet_preimage (by fun_prop) (measurableSet_singleton false)),
        (measurableSet_preimage (by fun_prop) (measurableSet_singleton false)), h, hi', hj']

by
    classical
    rcases hX with ⟨hXlaw⟩
    have hXmap : Measure.map X P = Ber(u, p) := hXlaw
    have hXi :
        Measure.map (fun ω ↦ i ∈ X ω) P =
          Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by
      simpa [Measure.map_map, Function.comp] using congrArg (Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s)) hXmap
    have hXj :
        Measure.map (fun ω ↦ j ∈ X ω) P =
          Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by
      simpa [Measure.map_map, Function.comp] using congrArg (Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s)) hXmap
    have hBer :
        Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) =
          Measure.map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by
      ext S hS
      have hSi : MeasurableSet ((fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) ⁻¹' S) := by
        exact (measurable_pi_apply i).measurableSet_preimage hS
      have hSj : MeasurableSet ((fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) ⁻¹' S) := by
        exact (measurable_pi_apply j).measurableSet_preimage hS
      simp only [Measure.map_apply, hSi, hSj, bernoulliOn_apply']
      have hi' : (i ∈ u) = True := by simpa using hi
      have hj' : (j ∈ u) = True := by simpa using hj
      simp [infinitePi_eq_map_enumfun, hi', hj']
    simpa [hXi, hXj] using hBer

by
    classical
    have hlaw : HasLaw X Ber(u, p) P := hX
    ext S hS
    have hmeas_i : Measurable fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s := by
      simpa using (measurable_pi_lambda (i := i) : Measurable fun s : Set ι ↦ (fun a ↦ a ∈ s) i)
    have hmeas_j : Measurable fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s := by
      simpa using (measurable_pi_lambda (i := j) : Measurable fun s : Set ι ↦ (fun a ↦ a ∈ s) j)
    have hcomp_i :
        map (fun ω ↦ i ∈ X ω) P =
          map (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by
      simpa [hlaw.map_eq, Measure.map_map hmeas_i]
    have hcomp_j :
        map (fun ω ↦ j ∈ X ω) P =
          map (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by
      simpa [hlaw.map_eq, Measure.map_map hmeas_j]
    simp [hcomp_i, hcomp_j, bernoulliOn_apply', hi, hj, hS]
